data.title: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE, XLM, SUI at risk as Bitcoin may drop below $115,000, halting the altcoin season.
data.description: The support level for Bitcoin is currently at $115,000, with the possibility of a breakout that could halt the ongoing altcoin season.

data.title: KPN completes €250m share buyback, repurchasing 62,465,117 shares at an average price of €4 per share.
data.description: KPN has recently finalized a share buyback program worth €250 million, which began on February 25, 2025, and concluded on July 25, 2025. During this period, the company successfully repurchased 62,465,117 ordinary shares at an average price of €4.00 per share.
U.S. Crude Oil Futures Closed at $65.16 Per Barrel, Dropping by $0.87 or 1.32%
NYMEX Gasoline August futures settle at $2.0970 a gallon.

data.title: Inventor from Glendale, Ariz. develops product named THE STYLER to hold/grip small makeup pencils. Published on July 25, 2025.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Glendale, Arizona shared their inspiration behind creating THE STYLER, a new innovation aimed at improving the grip and usability of small makeup pencils. The inventor highlighted the intention to address the common issue of small pencils becoming difficult to use over time. THE STYLER boasts a patent-pending design that eliminates the need to dispose of pencils prematurely due to size constraints, ultimately offering a more sustainable solution for makeup users.
NYMEX Natural Gas August FUTURES SETTLE AT $3.1100/MMBtu.

data.title: Congress urges FDA to stop illegal weight-loss drug imports from China, including counterfeit GLP-1 drugs like Wegovy.
data.description: A bipartisan group of over 80 members, led by U.S. Representative Richard Hudson and Herbert Conaway, penned a letter to FDA Commissioner Marty Makary requesting action against counterfeit and copycat versions of GLP-1 drugs. The letter, delivered on Friday, particularly highlighted the influx of fake versions of Novo Nordisk A/S' Wegovy (semaglutide) and Eli Lilly and Co.'s Zepbound entering the market. These illicit products, which also include unauthorized versions of Ozempic and Wegovy's active ingredients, are often smuggled from unregistered foreign sources, mainly China. The group emphasized the urgent need to address this growing threat of counterfeit anti-obesity medications in the U.S. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.
Rapidly rising digital currency market sees surge in value, attracting investors and reaching record highs.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures saw gains for Circle, CoreWeave, Palantir, Roblox, Shopify. CPI inflation report expect Tuesday.
data.description: Stock futures for the Dow Jones showed significant gains on Monday for companies such as Circle, CoreWeave, Palantir, Roblox, and Shopify. These companies emerged as the biggest winners. Investors are now eagerly awaiting the CPI inflation report scheduled to be released on Tuesday. The upcoming release of this important economic data will be closely watched by market participants.

data.title: Federal regulators are proposing to reduce a key capital requirement for big banks after years of planning.
data.description: Federal regulators are considering reducing a significant capital requirement for large banks that has been under review for several years.

data.title: China reduced its U.S. Treasury holdings to $756.3 billion, lowest in 16 years, signaling displeasure amidst trade tensions.
data.description: China has reduced its U.S. Treasury holdings to $756.3 billion, the lowest in over 16 years in May. This is the third consecutive month of reductions, down from over $1.3 trillion held between 2012 and 2016. Because of this reduction, China has slipped to third place among foreign creditors to the U.S., behind Japan and the United Kingdom. This move is likely a geopolitical signal, possibly in response to Trump's aggressive tariff regime, serving as a form of financial retaliation. By lessening their American debt holdings, China is subtly reminding the U.S. that economic pressure can be applied quietly through financial markets. This demonstrates that China has leverage beyond just trade in their relationship with the U.S.

data.title: Fears rise as Trump considers ousting Fed Chair Powell before 2026 term end; Odds reach 20% on prediction market.
data.description: There is growing speculation that President Trump may fire Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell before his term ends in May 2026, leading to concerns about central bank independence. If Trump were to remove Powell, it would be the first time in modern U.S. history a president attempts to do so without cause. The probability of Powell being ousted by the end of 2025 has risen to over 20%, the highest since April, on the Kalshi prediction market platform. This increase in political risk followed a report that Trump had shown a draft letter firing Powell in a meeting with House Republicans. The incident has stirred controversy and could potentially lead to a constitutional crisis and impact global markets.

data.title: US-China trade deal reduces tariffs by over 100%, S&P 500 surges. Risks persist despite gains.
data.description: The recent trade agreement between the United States and China will result in a significant reduction of tariffs, exceeding 100%, providing a boost to the S&P 500 which surged on Monday. This development has prompted a positive market response. However, uncertainties and risks continue to loom despite the apparent progress in the trade deal.

data.title: Stock market bubble warnings grow louder as speculative activities surge. NVDA stock up 30%. Goldman Sachs indicator at historic extremes. Gains of over 60% in most shorted stocks. Expert opinions from major financial institutions.
data.description: The article warns about a potential stock market bubble as various indicators signal excessive speculation and risky behavior on Wall Street. NVDA stock has surged by 30% this year. Experts from Goldman Sachs, Bank of America, Yardeni Research, Apollo, and JPMorgan have all raised red flags due to high speculative activity, policy easing, and market concentration resembling past financial manias. Goldman Sachs notes that their Speculative Trading Indicator is at historical extremes outside of previous bubbles, fueled by increased trading in unprofitable stocks, penny stocks, and high-multiple tech companies. A 50% rally in popular retail trader stocks since April and an extreme short squeeze in heavily shorted stocks add to the concerns. The surge in speculative activity and short squeezes mirror dynamics seen during the dot-com and meme stock eras. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Berger Montague PC investigates securities claims against RxSight, Inc. (NASDAQ: RXST) for potential fraud.
data.description: A prominent national securities litigation law firm, Berger Montague PC, revealed on July 25, 2025, that they are investigating potential securities fraud allegations surrounding RxSight, Inc. The company, listed as RXST on the NASDAQ, is under scrutiny following a recent federal filing.
Intel Announces It Has Started Looking for Key Investors for Its Networking and Communications Division

data.title: Fed inflation rate exceeds expectations, reducing chance of a July rate cut. S&P 500 increases. Trump considers new chair.
data.description: The primary inflation rate controlled by the Federal Reserve increased higher than anticipated, leading to reduced likelihood of a rate cut in July, much to the disappointment of President Trump. The news of the inflation rate exceeding expectations comes as Trump considers appointing a new chairperson. Despite this development, the S&P 500 saw an increase following the report.

data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp announces approval of plan to convert to public stock company; stockholders and members approved on July 1, 2025.
data.description: On July 1, 2025, Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. revealed that stockholders of the company and members of Lake Shore, MHC gave the green light to the Amended and Restated Plan of Conversion and Reorganization. This move is part of Lake Shore MHC's shift from a mutual holding company to a fully public stock holding company, transitioning the Bank from a federal savings bank to a New York chartered commercial bank. Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: LSBK) serves as the holding company for Lake Shore Savings Bank.

data.title: GOP's reconciliation package impacts tax filing for workers, with provisions causing disputes among Republicans.
data.description: The reconciliation package proposed by Republicans is expected to significantly impact the process of claiming deductions and credits for employees and employers during tax season. Certain provisions have already sparked notable disagreements among GOP lawmakers.

data.title: Sunbelt tomato trade deal with Mexico supported by Republicans faces opposition in U.S. Farm groups, urge not to exit as import duties cut.
data.description: Members of agricultural organizations, supported by GOP representatives from Arizona and Texas, are advocating for the Trump administration to remain in a tomato trade agreement with Mexico. The deal currently reduces import tariffs, and the groups emphasize the benefits of maintaining this agreement.
